title: claude-usage: state-file dedup prevents Slack spam after reset
desc: claude-usage used to post a Slack alert every call if thresholds tripped -- scheduled hourly runs spammed CRITICAL. Now persists {level, ts, weekly, session} to %LOCALAPPDATA%/WKAppBot/claude-usage-alert-state.json. Same-level cooldown 1h; escalation (WARNING->CRITICAL) bypasses cooldown; NONE transition clears state so post-reset alerts fire fresh.
steps: Compute newLevel: NONE, WARNING (>=85), CRITICAL (>=95), SESSION (session >=90)
Suppress if newLevel == lastLevel and <1h since last post
Escalation (rank up) posts immediately regardless of cooldown
NONE transition from non-NONE: clear state so post-reset fresh alerts work
Persist new state after successful post
author: claude
